description: The bird was small (about the size of the nearby Wilson's Warblers) and the features that jumped out at first were the solid blue-gray back and yellow chest.  Once we got closer looks we noticed the bird had a complete white eye-ring.  There also may have been a slight hind of a necklace.  The bird was foraging low some shrubs and twice I heard a metalic chip that was different from the Wilson's Warblers that were in the area.  This chip likely came from the Canada Warbler.
